courtyardId.label: Courtyard ID (optional)
courtyardId.help: Leave empty to use the first courtyard returned by the iGarden cloud. If you have several courtyards, set the desired ID from the adapter log.

createRawStates.label: Create raw dpId states
createRawStates.help: Creates raw states under devices.<device>.raw.dp_<id>. Writable raw states follow the cloud dpMode and are useful for diagnostics.
